raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Flooding rice fields in the winter improves soil health after the growing season.",
    "Winter-flooding of rice fields provides critical wetland habitat for birds and other wildlife along California’s Pacific Flyway.",
    "Flooding rice fields helps decompose leftover rice straw and waste grain, which offsets open-burring.",
    "Incentivizing winter-flooding is supported by environmentalists, hunters, and farmers.",
    "Winter-flooding mitigates the environmental impacts of extensive waterbird habitat loss in the Sacramento and San Joaquin Valleys.",
    "Due to the emergence of alternate rice straw decomposition practices and increased water rates, winter-flooding is becoming less cost competitive.",
    "AB 2348 will reverse the downward trend of winter-flooding practices in California.",
    "Fields flooded for longer periods enhance habitat benefits for birds.",
    "Research found that collaborative, voluntary programs for creating wetland habitats played a critical role during recent droughts.",
    "Flooded habitats provided significant support for one of the continent’s largest populations of migrating waterbirds."
  ]
}
```
